name: Ofir Marzouk
title: AI Solutions & QA Associate | Software Developer | Legal Engineer
summary: An adaptable solution engineer with hands-on experience in software development and QA testing, building end-to-end features from architecture to deployment. Integrates modern technologies, including AI, to enhance work and the software built. Also a qualified lawyer with experience in international law, real estate, compliance, and product management. Legal background enhances analytical approach and ability to navigate regulatory and business considerations within technical projects.

projects.name: The-Bull.ai
projects.description: AI-powered MVP using Python, React Native, and TypeScript. Architected to integrate multiple APIs for business intelligence.

projects.name: DataAnalyzer
projects.description: AI-powered web app using Python that creates graphic analyses and charts from raw data files.

projects.name: ShakespeareAI
projects.description: AI-powered chat application that responds to prompts in Shakespearean Old English.

projects.name: Invoices Manager
projects.description: AI-enhanced Invoice Manager built end-to-end (architecture to deployment). Full-stack with five cloud services for upload, AI extraction, validation, and storage.

experience.title: QA AI Data and Content Moderator
highlights: Evaluate and provide feedback to improve AI-assisted moderation workflows, contributing to the training and refinement of LLM development.
Review and moderate content according to Meta policies, ensuring high-standard accuracy and consistency in AI performance.
Collaborate with technical teams to support process improvements and maintain high-quality data standards.

experience.title: Product & Automation Specialist
highlights: Led the transition from over-engineered external tooling to lightweight in-house solutions, significantly reducing operating expenses.
Integrated automation tools for operational systems and marketing funnels, aligning technical development with business priorities.
Redesigned database structures and connected payment solutions to streamline financial operations.

experience.title: Product & Legal Lead
highlights: Managed the development of several Fintech products, an Online Trading platform, Web Applications, a cryptocurrency coin, and a cryptocurrency exchange service.
Acted as the primary bridge among legal, financial, and technical stakeholders to ensure compliant implementation of products.
Designed and maintained financial data structures and reporting systems for the company's technical products and real estate investment portfolio.

education.degree: CS50 AI with Python & CS50 Computer Science for Lawyers
